title: On the structure of Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya inequalities
summary:
In this article we establish new improvements of the optimal Hardy inequality
in the half space. We first add all possible linear combinations of Hardy type
terms thus revealing the structure of this type of inequalities and obtaining
best constants. We then add the critical Sobolev term and obtain necessary and
sufficient conditions for the validity of Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya type
inequalities.

title: Well-posedness and ill-posedness results for dissipative Benjamin-Ono   equations
summary:
We study the Cauchy problem for the dissipative Benjamin-Ono equations
$u_t+\H u_{xx}+|D|^\alpha u+uu_x=0$ with $0\leq\alpha\leq 2$. When
$0\leq\alpha< 1$, we show the ill-posedness in $H^s(\R)$, $s\in\R$, in the
sense that the flow map $u_0\mapsto u$ (if it exists) fails to be $\C^2$ at the
origin. For $1<\alpha\leq 2$, we prove the global well-posedness in $H^s(\R)$,
$s>-\alpha/4$. It turns out that this index is optimal.
